msdyn_plan.msdyn_description: A Dataverse-based revenue forecasting solution that lets operations, practice leaders, and finance teams import, review, approve, and analyze monthly project revenue.
msdyn_plan.msdyn_prompt:
Create a Revenue Forecast App using Dataverse Canvas App Power Automate.
Objective
Import an Excel file into Dataverse using the given schema. Import all columns and rows except columns Y to AK. The Excel contains project data, monthly actuals (past months), and forecasts (future months).
Dataverse Tables 1. Import Batch Batch Name, File Name Import Month, Year, Date Status = Draft, Under Review, Approved PL, Approved PH, Locked Current Total, Last Total, Variance 2. Project Master
(Store all Excel master columns)
Project ID (key) Project Description Customer ID, Customer Description Tower, Market, BU, Vertical Sub Practice, Category EDL/PDL/PM IDs & Names Opportunity ID/Name SO ID Project End Date Jan PPM 3. Monthly Revenue
(one row per project per month)
Project lookup Batch lookup Year Month (1–12) Amount Type = Actual / Forecast / Estimated Is Estimated (Yes/No) Locked (Yes/No)
Key = Project Year Month
4. Submission Summary Project lookup Batch lookup Current Total Last Total Variance Variance % Trend = Up / Down / Same Import Logic Import all fields except columns Y–AK Create/update Project Master For each month: → create/update Monthly Revenue records Business Rules 1. Forecast logic Actuals exist for (current month - 2) Forecast exists for future months
If forecast is blank: → use (current month - 2) value as Estimated Forecast
Example: If current month = April → use February value for all empty forecast months
2. Forecast limit
Fill forecast only until:
Project End Date month (if within current year) Else until December (current year) 3. Monthly import Each upload = new Import Batch Previous approved batch = Last Submission New batch = Current Submission 4. Totals Current Total = sum Jan–Dec Last Total = from previous batch 5. Variance Variance = Current - Last Show: ↑ green = increase ↓ red = decrease neutral = no change 6. Approval flow OPS imports batch Practice Lead reviews Practice Head approves Status = Locked (no edits) 7. Export Export locked batch to Excel Must match original format (including totals) UI Screens Dashboard (totals variance charts) Import Screen (upload preview) Batch Review Practice Lead Approval Practice Head Approval Project Detail (monthly view) Export Screen Power Automate Flow 1: Import Upload → validate → ignore Y–AK Create Batch Project Monthly data Apply forecast estimation Flow 2: Approval Notify Practice Lead → Practice Head On approval → Lock batch Flow 3: Comparison Get previous batch Calculate totals variance Flow 4: Export Generate Excel in source format Key Rules Project ID mandatory Project End Date required Numeric validation for revenue Locked batches cannot be edited Estimated values must be flagged Output Required Dataverse schema Canvas screens Power Automate flows Business rules Power Fx formulas (forecast, totals, variance)
